scripts.setup: npm install && npm run d1:migrate:local && npm run d1:seed
scripts.dev: pkill -f wrangler 2>/dev/null; pkill -f expo 2>/dev/null; pkill -f react-native 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd packages/frontend && npm run build && rm -rf ../../dist && cp -R dist ../../dist
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build:frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:frontend:preview: npm run build:frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch preview
scripts.d1:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --local --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:preview: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db-preview --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:bio: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --file=migrations/0004_add_bio.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:bio:local: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --local --file=migrations/0004_add_bio.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:invite-codes: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --file=migrations/0006_invite_codes.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:invite-codes:local: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --local --file=migrations/0006_invite_codes.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:seed: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --local --file=migrations/seed_centers.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:seed:preview: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db-preview --file=migrations/seed_centers.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
